Highlights

Regenerated from the latest data; extended to other redshifts as their ensembles complete.

Generating ~2000 calibrated mock galaxy catalogs on Perlmutter (AbacusSummit × rgrspit_diffsky) to estimate covariance for the Roman GRS PIT.
